query:
UPDATE monthly_allowances SET breakdown_formula = '기본 100만원 + DDC 1위 +3 = 103만원' WHERE member_id = 'dad' AND month = '2026-03';
UPDATE monthly_allowances SET breakdown_formula = '기본 5만원 + DDC 1위 +5 = 10만원' WHERE member_id = 'liam' AND month = '2026-03';
command:
